gates.name: Contract completeness
evidenceRequired: build proves public pack generated from authoritative contracts
evidenceAvailable: Phase 7 skeleton and SDK shape checks
gates.notes: Candidate contracts exist but are not yet promoted or generated from a live implementation.

gates.name: Capability honesty
evidenceRequired: live capability manifest matches deployed runtime
evidenceAvailable: candidate capability and agent tool manifest examples
gates.notes: No deployed runtime exists to compare with the manifest.

gates.name: Rehearsal safety
evidenceRequired: preflight/dry-run executes real validation and authority checks
gates.notes: Contract exists; runtime no-side-effect behavior is not proven.

gates.name: Error determinism
evidenceRequired: all public non-success outcomes map to registered reason codes
SDK branches on codes not text
gates.notes: Registry exists as draft; runtime exhaustiveness not proven.

gates.name: Candidate-first ingestion
evidenceRequired: FMIS/machinery/sensor adapters emit source fidelity, loss maps, candidate receipts
evidenceAvailable: Phase 6 source-fidelity, loss-map, FMIS shadow import contracts
gates.notes: Fixtures define required behavior; no adapter runtime has passed it.

gates.name: Display honesty
evidenceRequired: public read surfaces emit result qualification
evidenceAvailable: Phase 5 UI-safe state matrix and demos
gates.notes: Contract and examples exist; no UI implementation has passed preservation tests.

gates.name: Numeric determinism
evidenceAvailable: Phase 6 calculation and formula catalog contracts
gates.notes: No live calculation service or external formula evidence has been validated.

gates.name: Semantic-law conformance
evidenceRequired: no blocker waived by protocol success
gates.notes: The test suite exists but has not been run against an implementation.

gates.name: Two-agent compatibility
evidenceRequired: two independent AI coding agents build compatible client workflows
public contract pack adjusted if divergence found
evidenceAvailable: Phase 8 two-agent compatibility build test manifest
gates.notes: The compatibility test is defined but not executed.

gates.name: Public/internal boundary enforcement
evidenceRequired: CI fails on internal surface leakage
released SDK generated only from public contracts
gates.notes: Boundary contracts exist; CI enforcement and generated SDK artefacts are not produced.
